allow: Bash(node -e 'const Database=require\("better-sqlite3"\);const db=new Database\("/Users/waldo/Temp/waldo.WTF.dev/lake.db",{readonly:true}\);console.log\("user_version:",db.prepare\("PRAGMA user_version"\).get\(\)\);console.log\("tables:",db.prepare\("SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type=\\"table\\" AND name NOT LIKE \\"sqlite_%\\" ORDER BY name"\).all\(\).map\(r=>r.name\)\);console.log\("messages:",db.prepare\("SELECT COUNT\(*\) n FROM messages"\).get\(\)\);db.close\(\);')
